name: fn_calculate_discount
description: Calculate the final price after applying a discount percentage to an original price.

name: fn_convert_currency
description: Convert an amount from one currency to another using a given exchange rate.

name: fn_count_vowels
description: Count the total number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in a text string.

name: fn_is_palindrome
description: Determine whether a given text string reads the same backward as forward.

name: fn_get_domain_from_email
description: Extract and return the domain name from a given email address.
